stories.title: Visual Polish Pass — Glow/Bloom on All Entities
acceptanceCriteria: entities/Player.gd _draw() uses overdraw bloom (larger dimmer shape behind main shape)
entities/enemies/GreenEnemy.gd _draw_shape() has a glow ring behind body
entities/enemies/RedEnemy.gd _draw_shape() has a glow ring
entities/enemies/YellowEnemy.gd _draw_shape() has a glow ring
entities/Bullet.gd _draw() has a bright core with a soft outer glow
entities/EnemyBullet.gd _draw() has a glow layer
entities/enemies/BossEnemy.gd _draw_shape() enhanced with more ring detail and pulsing core glow

stories.title: Background Upgrade — Nebula, Asteroids, Planet
acceptanceCriteria: scenes/Game.gd has a nebula layer drawn behind stars (large soft translucent blobs)
scenes/Game.gd has a distant planet silhouette (partially visible circle with rings, far right or off-screen edge)
scenes/Game.gd has a slow-moving asteroid field layer (irregular polygons at z_index 2)
All new background layers scroll at different parallax speeds
Background additions are in inner classes (_NebulaLayer, _AsteroidLayer) matching existing _StarLayer pattern

stories.title: Bullet & Impact Effects — Muzzle Flash, Trails, Hit Sparks
acceptanceCriteria: scenes/Game.gd _fire_bullet() spawns a muzzle flash Node2D at muzzle position that fades in ~0.08s
entities/Bullet.gd has a trail: stores last 5 positions, draws fading line segments behind bullet
entities/enemies/BaseEnemy.gd hit() spawns a _HitSpark inner class (3-5 small particles that fly outward and fade)
_HitSpark uses color matching the enemy's _color
Explosion burst in BaseEnemy is enhanced: larger particles, longer duration (0.6s), more varied sizes

stories.title: HUD Visual Upgrade — Ship Icons, Score Pop, Combo Arc
acceptanceCriteria: scenes/HUD.gd update_lives() renders small ship silhouette icons instead of a number
scenes/HUD.gd update_score() triggers a brief scale-pop tween on the score label when score increases
scenes/HUD.gd update_combo() renders the multiplier as a colored arc/ring around the combo number
HUD ship icons match the player ship shape (small arrowhead polygon)
Score pop tween: scale to 1.3 then back to 1.0 over 0.2s
